data.name: Hentai Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
Gameplay:

Move All Parts to Form the Complete Image.

Characteristics


  • 8 levels
  • 8 uncensored artworks
  • Relaxing soundtrack
  • Full hd art gallery

    Cheat Mode:


    Press "C" to complete the level.

    Gallery:


    Mouse scroll up/down = zoom in/out

Note: All Characters 18+ Years Old.


Every artwork in our game were paid and/or original from paid commissions.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: i3
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 顯示卡: 4 GB
